---
title: "automotive_exploration"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(maps)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
auto_assembly_plants <- read_csv("../data/Industrial Institutions/Auto_Assembly_Plants_Wikipedia.csv")
EV_manufacturing_facilities <- read_csv("../data/Industrial Institutions/Clean_EV_ManufacturingFacilities.csv")
```

## EDA Graphs
```{r}
# filtering dataset to only Vehicle Assembly facilities to match with the wiki page
clean_EVs <- EV_manufacturing_facilities %>%
  filter(`Component Category` == "Vehicle Assembly")
clean_EVs
```

```{r}
auto_manufacturer_counts <- auto_assembly_plants %>%
  count(Manufacturer, sort = TRUE)
ggplot(auto_manufacturer_counts,
       aes(x = n, y = reorder(Manufacturer, n))) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Auto Assembly Plants by Manufacturer",
    x = "Manufacturer",
    y = "Number of plants"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ev_parent_counts <- clean_EVs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Parent Company`)) %>%
  count(`Parent Company`, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 15)

ggplot(ev_parent_counts,
       aes(x = n, y = reorder(`Parent Company`, n))) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Top EV Manufacturing Parent Companies",
    x = "Parent company",
    y = "Number of facilities"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ev_timeline <- clean_EVs %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Announcement Effective Year`)) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(`Announcement Effective Year`)) %>%
  count(year)

ggplot(ev_timeline, aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "EV Manufacturing Announcements by Year",
    x = "Announcement year",
    y = "Number of announcements"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# checking rows with empty city values
clean_EVs %>%
  filter(is.na(City) | City == "") %>%
  select(Company, `Facility Name`, State)

# cleaning those rows
ev_map <- clean_EVs %>%
  filter(!is.na(City), City != "")

# changing Ontario facility coordinates from Canada to California 
ev_map <- clean_EVs %>%
  mutate(
    latitude = if_else(
      Company == "Cenntro Automotive",
      34.0633,
      latitude
    ),
    longitude = if_else(
      Company == "Cenntro Automotive",
      -117.6509,
      longitude
    )
  )

auto_map <- auto_assembly_plants %>%
  filter(Address != "TBA")
```


```{r}
# creating a clean joined dataset
ev_map_clean <- ev_map %>%
  mutate(
    company = Company,
    facility_name = `Facility Name`,
    city = City,
    state = State,
    address = Address,
    latitude = latitude,
    longitude = longitude,
    products_or_focus = `Manufacturing Focus`,
    source_dataset = "EV manufacturing",
    EV_facility = TRUE,
    .keep = "none"
  )

auto_map_clean <- auto_map %>%
  mutate(
    company = Manufacturer,
    facility_name = `Plant Name`,
    city = NA_character_,
    state = NA_character_,
    address = Address,
    latitude = latitude,
    longitude = longitude,
    products_or_focus = Products,
    source_dataset = "Auto assembly",
    EV_facility = FALSE,
    .keep = "none"
  )

combined_auto_ev_map <- bind_rows(ev_map_clean, auto_map_clean)
```

```{r}
write_csv(combined_auto_ev_map, "auto_ev_map.csv")
```



```{r}
leaflet() %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%

  # Auto assembly plants
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = auto_map,
    lng = ~longitude,
    lat = ~latitude,
    radius = 5,
    color = "blue",
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    group = "Auto Assembly Plants",
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<strong>", `Plant Name`, "</strong><br>",
      "Manufacturer: ", Manufacturer, "<br>",
      "Address: ", Address, "<br>",
      "Products: ", Products
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # EV manufacturing facilities
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = ev_map,
    lng = ~longitude,
    lat = ~latitude,
    radius = 4,
    color = "red",
    fillOpacity = 0.6,
    group = "EV Manufacturing Facilities",
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<strong>", `Facility Name`, "</strong><br>",
      "Company: ", Company, "<br>",
      "Parent Company: ", `Parent Company`, "<br>",
      "City: ", City, ", ", State, "<br>",
      "Component Category: ", `Component Category`, "<br>",
      "Manufacturing Focus: ", `Manufacturing Focus`
    )
  ) %>%
  
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("Auto Assembly Plants", "EV Manufacturing Facilities"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  )
```
